name: Chocolate Peanut Clusters
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small microwave-safe bowl, combine milk chocolate chips, semi-sweet chocolate chips, and shortening.
2. Microwave at HIGH for 1 to 1-1/2 minutes or until the chips are melted and the mixture is smooth when stirred.
3. Stir in the peanuts.
4. Drop teaspoonfuls of the mixture into 1-inch diameter candy or petit four papers.
5. Allow the clusters to set until firm.
6. Store in an airtight container in a cool, dry place.
About 2 dozen candies.
